missions.title: Mastery Module 1: SI units and Related Concepts
missions.description: Comprehensive analysis covering SI units, fundamental units, derived units and advanced applications.

microtargets.title: SI units
ncertAnchors: NCERT Physics Class 11, Chapter: Physics and Measurement, Section detailing SI units
mustKnowFacts: A thorough understanding of SI units is heavily tested in recent NEET papers.
Applying the core principles of SI units correctly is essential for solving complex multi-step problems in Physics and Measurement.
commonTraps: Misinterpreting the subtle edge cases of SI units during high-pressure exam scenarios.
Failing to recall the exact conditions or sign conventions associated with SI units.
masteryCriteria: Can accurately solve numericals or identify biological structures related specifically to SI units.
Successfully avoids common pitfalls when SI units is integrated with other concepts in Physics and Measurement.
pyqPatterns: Past year questions frequently test the application of SI units in tricky assertion-reason or statement-based questions.

activeRecallQuestions.question: What are the critical factors or principles governing SI units?
Describe a scenario where applying the concept of SI units can lead to a common student error.
